name: Vegetable Chop Suey (Microwave)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix celery, onion, mushrooms, and butter in a 2-quart casserole. Cover.
2. Microwave on high for 6-8 minutes, or until tender-crisp. Set aside.
3. In a 2-cup measure, combine water, soy sauce, cornstarch, beef bouillon, and sugar. Stirring twice during cooking, microwave on high for 2 minutes, or until thickened.
4. Mix the sauce and remaining ingredients with the celery mixture. Microwave at high for 4-6 minutes, or until thoroughly heated, stirring after half the time. Serve over rice or chow mein noodles.
